response:
VERDICT: TAMPERED
ROUND: 7
REASONING: In Round 7, on line L0173, the temp1 value `1110 0011 0111 1011 1010 0101 1001 1111` is obtained by adding step3 and W[7]. However, on line L0172, step3 is `1011 1101 0100 1101 0111 0101 0011 1111`, and W[7] is `0010 0110 0010 1110 0011 0000 0110 0000`, their correct sum is `1111 0011 0111 1000 1010 0101 1010 1111` which differs from the reported temp1 value by one bit. This indicates a one-bit flip tamper here, affecting all calculations from this point forward.
